block.sunlit_cobblemon.trainer_podium.de: 邀请训练师到你的道馆。他们的等级会与你队伍的平均等级相匹配
block.sunlit_cobblemon.sun_raid_statue.d: 每天一次召唤一只太阳团战宝可梦. Shift + 右键启动雕像
block.sunlit_cobblemon.sun_raid_statue.b: 破坏太阳团战雕像将会亵渎它的神圣性，并且该神像也不会掉落。 如需破坏,你需要潜行时破坏.
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.silph_scope.des: 允许宝可梦在你附近生成
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.poke_bobber.des: 钓鱼成功时可以钓到常见宝可梦
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.great_poke_bobb: 钓鱼成功时可以钓到稀有宝可梦
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.ultra_poke_bobb: 钓鱼成功时可以钓到罕见宝可梦
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.master_poke_bob: 钓鱼成功时可以钓到传说宝可梦
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.sun_mirror.desc: Right click a Sun Raid Statue to extract the Pokémon in the mirror
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.sun_mirror.inse: Right click a Sun Raid Statue to insert the Pokémon from the mirror
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.greater_tm_pack: 至少有一个招式学习器!
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.berry_capsule.d: 包含随机一种常见树果
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.pofflet_box.des: 包含4种随机类型的宝芬
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.sun_drops.descr: 通常在灌注了太阳之力的宝可梦身上掉落
Rarely dropped from high tier Pokémon infused with the power of the sun
Offer to a Sun Raid Statue to lure in a different Pokémon from the current spawn pool and tier
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.sun_essence.des: Offer to a Sun Raid Statue to upgrade its tier by 1 without changing the current Pokémon
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.sunlit_league_m: Won from Sunlit League trainers that appear every 10 wins in a row from the trainer podium
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.poke_radar.desc: Scans for possible Pokémon spawns. Can be equipped to show them on screen, updated every 10 seconds
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.poke_radar.righ: §6Right Click§7 to scan from selected bucket
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.poke_radar.shif: §6Shift + Right Click§7 to update equipped radar's bucket
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.blooming_ring.d: 供奉给太阳团战雕像以召唤哲尔尼亚斯
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.cornucopia_of_g: 供奉给太阳团战雕像以召唤伊裴尔塔尔
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.blazing_calamit: 在灾祸之桩上使用以召唤古玉鱼
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.frozen_calamity: 在灾祸之桩上使用以召唤古剑豹
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.gem_box.descrip:
它散发出一种令人不安的气息。
似乎每一面都有放置宝石的凹槽
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.tabula_rasa.des: There's an engraving of a box with a 7 in it on the back...
Has been said to attract powerful legendary birds when worn in the charm slot
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.rainbow_steam.d: Has been said to attract powerful forces of nature when worn in the charm slot
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.swampy_mystica_: Has been said to attract lake spirits when worn in the charm slot
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.moongeist_cryst: Used in a Moon Ritual to summon Lunala
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.fire_pledge.des: 证明你对火系初始宝可梦的忠诚度
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.grass_pledge.de: 证明你对草系初始宝可梦的忠诚度
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.water_pledge.de: 证明你对水系初始宝可梦的忠诚度
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.gachamon_capsul: Spawns a random Pokémon from a preset pool alongside a bonus pool
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.cobblemon.speci: Changes the ability of the Pokémon it is used on to their alternative standard ability
Changes the ability of the Pokémon it is used on to their alternative hidden ability
tooltip.sunlit_cobblemon.cobblemon.mulch: Increases the growth rate of the Berry Tree that it is used on for 3 harvests.
Increases the yield of the harvest of the Berry Tree that it is used on for 3 harvests.

Increases the chances for a mutation of a Berry on the Berry Tree for 3 harvests.
It can also mutate a fully grown Revival Herb into a Mental Herb, Power Herb, White Herb, or Mirror Herb.
Makes the Berry Tree act like it's in a Plains biome for an infinite duration.
Makes the Berry Tree act like it's in a Mountains or Taiga biome for an infinite duration.
Makes the Berry Tree act like it's in a Forest biome for an infinite duration.
Makes the Berry Tree act like it's in a Jungle or Swamp biome for an infinite duration.
Makes the Berry Tree act like it's in an Arid biome for an infinite duration.

Burns the holder.

The holder's multi-strike moves will hit at least 4 times.
